summary: P1 refactor regression testing for Trading Calculator PRO. Backend: 8/8 tests passed in /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_p1.py covering payoff/greeks/pnl-attribution/assignment math endpoints, /api/optimize ranking, and refactored /api/ohlc for BTC(7d hourly)/ETH(30d 4h)/UNKNOWN(fallback to bitcoin). Math values match smoke-test exactly: long call (strike=150, prem=5) -> maxProfit=4749.35, maxLoss=-500.65, totalFees=0.65, breakEven=155.0. OHLC refactor returns ~168 hourly candles for BTC?days=7. UNKNOWN symbol returns 200 (not 500) with empty/fallback ohlc and symbol echoed. CoinGecko free tier 429-rate-limits aggressively; tests include retry/skip logic. Pytest collection passes for test_trading_calculator.py and test_stripe_payments.py with new type hints (no TypeError). Frontend: /options page renders cleanly for demo user, all 12 required testids present (tab-calculator, tab-optimize, tab-flow, tab-chain, tab-iv-surface, tab-education, commission-input, compare-toggle, toggle-kelly, toggle-greeks, toggle-portfolio, live-price). compare-panel renders on toggle. All 6 tabs are clickable and switch views. EarningsBanner renders without crash (showing 'Earnings 2026-04-30 in 5d within expiry'). Toggle Kelly/Greeks/Portfolio all work. No JSX runtime errors.

issues: React hydration warning logged: ' cannot be a child of is invalid HTML and triggers a console error). Pre-existing in LegEditor, NOT introduced by this refactor. Recommend rendering option label as plain text.
Recharts warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial mount before container is sized. Cosmetic, charts render correctly after layout settles. Pre-existing.

action_items: (Already fixed by test agent) Restore data-testid attributes for tab-calculator, tab-chain, tab-iv-surface, tab-education in OptionsSubHeader.jsx — only optimize/flow had testids after the refactor extraction. Required by spec ('all 6 tabs ... testids must all be visible').
critical_code_review_comments: OptionsSubHeader.jsx TABS array originally lost 4 of 6 tab testids during the refactor extraction (only optimize and flow had testid keys). The spec required all 6 — fix applied: added testid for calculator/chain/iv-surface/education entries.

Refactored get_ohlc_data() in backend/server.py is clean: helper functions _COINGECKO_COIN_MAP / _pick_ohlc_interval_ms / _candle_from_bucket / _group_prices_into_ohlc are well-typed, single-purpose, each <20 lines. Cyclomatic complexity dropped meaningfully. UNKNOWN symbol falls back to coin_id='bitcoin' but echoes 'UNKNOWN' in response — correct per spec.
test_trading_calculator.py and test_stripe_payments.py type hints are valid (verified via pytest --collect-only — no TypeError, all 28 tests collected).

CalculatorPage.jsx now 577 lines (was 819) — 5 sub-components (OptionsSubHeader/StatsKPIBar/CompareBar/EarningsBanner/AdvancedToggles) extracted cleanly. Behavior preserved: compare-panel still renders on toggle, EarningsBanner renders without null-crash, advanced toggles still drive their panels.
Pre-existing (not introduced by this refactor): LegEditor.jsx renders <span> inside <option> — invalid HTML, fires React hydration error in console. Cosmetic but should be cleaned up.
test_credentials: demo@btccalc.pro / 1234 (premium lifetime, seeded). Login works and returns valid JWT.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 refactor verified clean. Backend math endpoints (payoff/greeks/pnl-attribution/assignment) preserve exact math from pre-refactor smoke tests. /api/optimize returns ranked strategies for AAPL bullish. Refactored /api/ohlc handles BTC/ETH/UNKNOWN correctly. Frontend /options page renders all 6 tabs (testids restored), all advanced toggles work, compare-panel toggles correctly, EarningsBanner does not crash on null nextEarnings. 2 pre-existing issues to flag (NOT regressions): (a) LegEditor renders <span> inside <option> causing React hydration warning, (b) Recharts width(-1) warning on cold mount. Neither blocks functionality. CoinGecko free tier 429-rate-limits — tests include retry/skip; if main agent re-runs and OHLC tests skip, that is environmental, not a code defect.
rca of the issue: Refactor regression: When the original CalculatorPage's tab definitions were extracted into OptionsSubHeader.jsx, the TABS array was rewritten and only the 'optimize' and 'flow' entries got `testid` keys — the other 4 (calculator/chain/iv-surface/education) lost theirs. Reproduction: visit /options as demo user, query [data-testid=tab-calculator] -> dom_count=0. Fix: added testid keys for all 6 entries so the existing render code (already references {testid} via destructure) emits the data-testid on every tab button. Verified: all 12 required testids now have dom_count=1 and tabs are clickable.
